questions.question:
$$ \text{Initial guess} \quad x1 = 0 \quad and \quad x2 = 1 $$
$$ x3 = \frac{x1 + x2}{2} $$
$$\text{equation } = exp(x) × cos(x) -1.4 $$
$$\text{What is function value of 8th iteration using bisection method?}$$
